final_prompt.prompt:
Create a vertical short-form video thumbnail for a gaming monitor product launch.

Style/medium: minimalist high-end graphic design, clean sans-serif typography, tech product launch aesthetic
Composition: rule of thirds layout, large bold headline occupying upper third, product info balanced in lower two-thirds
Subject: gaming monitor promotional graphic with dominant text hierarchy
Scene/backdrop: pure solid or subtle gradient background, generous negative space
Color palette: deep neutral base (charcoal or black) with electric blue or neon accent for tech feel, high contrast white text
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz", "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩"
Constraints: vertical 9:16 format optimized for mobile viewing; headline must be largest element; text must remain legible at small thumbnail size
Avoid: cluttered layout, multiple competing fonts, decorative flourishes, stock photo backgrounds, generic gaming cliches (flames, skulls, circuit patterns)
